JavaScript test scripts for object property assignment, function properties, pass-by-value, and prototype checks.


## Files
- **[13.02-001.js](13.02-001.js.md)**: Tests object property assignment and verification in a JavaScript function.
- **[13.02-002.js](13.02-002.js.md)**: Tests the immutability and non-enumerability of the `length` property of a function in JavaScript.
- **[13.02-003.js](13.02-003.js.md)**: Tests object property assignment in JavaScript using a function.
- **[13.02-004.js](13.02-004.js.md)**: Tests pass-by-value behavior in JavaScript by verifying a variable remains unchanged after a function call.
- **[13.02-005.js](13.02-005.js.md)**: A test script that verifies the function `foo` returns `null`.
- **[13.02-006.js](13.02-006.js.md)**: Tests that the function `foo` returns `undefined`.
- **[13.02-007.js](13.02-007.js.md)**: Tests object property assignment and retrieval in JavaScript.
- **[13.02-008.js](13.02-008.js.md)**: Tests if `func` is a prototype of `Function` using `isPrototypeOf`.
